---
title: "Math Knowledge Chart"
author: "DigitCoral"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

#### ***This is an idea on how to connect the maths knowledges together for my son***

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, out.width="100%"}

knitr::include_app(" https://young-shore.shinyapps.io/math_rela_chart", height="700px")

```
